title: Moirai Configuration
description: Configuration for the Moirai plan-implement-verify workflow plugin

$schema.description: Path to the JSON schema file for IDE autocompletion

statuses.description: Mapping of workflow phases to Linear status names. These are team-specific and discovered during first-run setup.

todo.description: Linear status name for items ready to be picked up

inProgress.description: Linear status name for items currently being worked on

inReview.description: Linear status name for items awaiting verification

done.description: Linear status name for completed items

maxWarnings.description: Maximum number of warnings allowed before blocking progress. Set to -1 for advisory-only mode (warnings never block).

commands.description: Shell commands to run during the verify phase (e.g. test, lint, typecheck, build). Auto-detected on first run if not configured.

maxParallel.description: Maximum number of concurrent implementer subagents per wave. Set to 1 for sequential execution.
